records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when an official Colombian authority or racecourse publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed official material is regulatory and historical; it does not confirm a current domestic meeting calendar.
limitations: The source establishes regulatory context rather than current racing activity.
No current racecourse or meeting-date pairing is approved.
Historical plans or betting regulations must not generate current calendar rows.
records.notes: Keep Colombia out of current-calendar output until a current official meeting source is reviewed.
